response.justification: Maria Rodriguez is a capable senior individual contributor with broad technical experience, but she is fundamentally mismatched for a CTO executive role. There is no evidence of engineering team leadership, organizational scaling, board-level communication, or executive decision-making at any point in her career. Her AI and agentic-system experience is limited to one month at re:cinq and does not approach the production multi-agent systems depth the role demands. Her fintech exposure (RIDE Capital) was as a developer, not an architect or leader. The role requires someone who has scaled engineering organizations, governed multi-team delivery, and operated AI systems in regulated financial environments — none of which this resume demonstrates.
strengths: Genuine breadth across distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput backends (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP req/s), showing real engineering depth as an IC
Early and hands-on exposure to agentic AI tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, indicating awareness of the relevant technical landscape
Long track record of shipping production software across diverse stacks and domains, including open-source GIS platform with real users
concerns: Zero evidence of engineering leadership or people management — every role in the resume is an individual contributor position with no reported direct reports or team ownership
Agentic AI and LLM experience is confined to a single month at current employer and lacks the production scale, evaluation rigor, and regulatory-environment depth the CTO role mandates
No exposure to executive responsibilities: no board communication, no organizational design, no hiring strategy, no budget ownership, and no governance of outsourced engineering

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI/fintech seniority for CTO scope
